Why SenseCollect
## A simpler way to collect public web data

SenseCollect removes the technical steps from common scraping jobs, so teams can focus on the research instead of the setup.

Built for fast, repeatable exports instead of custom scraper projects.

Made for non-technical teams

Run common scraping jobs from simple forms. No code, browser extensions, or scraper setup.

Clean CSV output

Download structured rows you can open in spreadsheets, import into tools, or hand to your team.

Pay only when you need data

Use one-time credit packs or a single run. Credits do not expire, and failed jobs are refunded.

Scraping handled for you

SenseCollect runs the extraction, tracks job status, stores results, and prepares downloads.

How it works
## From search to CSV in three steps

No Apify account, no actor configuration, no scraper builder. SenseCollect keeps the workflow intentionally short.

0 1

Choose a tool

Start with Google Maps leads or browse upcoming exporters.

0 2

Enter your search

Add a query, location, and run size in plain language.

0 3

Download the CSV

Get a structured file when the job finishes.

One-time payments only. Credits never expire, and you can buy more whenever a project needs fresh data.

Questions
## FAQ

Clear answers for first-time users who just want a reliable export.

Is this a developer platform?+
No. SenseCollect is a simple self-service utility for non-technical exports.

Do credits expire?+
No. Purchased credits stay in your account until you use them.

What happens if a job fails?+
Credits are automatically refunded when an export fails.

What should I try first?+
Start with a narrow Google Maps search, such as a business category plus one city.
